FISHUT.Module.Name: Substances and Paraphernalia
FISHUT.Settings.EnforceParaphernalia.Hin: When on, substances with required paraphernalia cannot be consumed unless the actor possesses the required gear. When off, all substances consume freely.
FISHUT.Settings.StrictDaeRequirement.Nam: Block substances that require DAE when DAE is missing
FISHUT.Settings.StrictDaeRequirement.Hin: When on, a substance whose Active Effects are flagged as requiring DAE cannot be consumed unless the DAE module is active. When off (default), the substance is consumed but a warning is shown — its DAE-mode effects may silently fail to apply.
FISHUT.Settings.SuppressIntegrationWarni: When on, the ready-time notification listing recommended-but-missing modules is suppressed. Per-substance DAE warnings are unaffected.
FISHUT.Settings.Debug.Name: Debug logging
FISHUT.Settings.Debug.Hint: Print module-prefixed debug messages to the browser console. Warnings and errors are always shown.
FISHUT.Gating.Blocked.Title: Missing paraphernalia
FISHUT.Integrations.Missing.Notice: Substances and Paraphernalia recommends modules that aren't active: {missing}. Disable this notice in the module settings.
FISHUT.Integrations.RequiresDae.Warn: {item}: this substance has effects that require DAE. DAE isn't active — those effect modes may silently fail to apply.
FISHUT.Integrations.RequiresDae.Block: {item}: requires DAE, and DAE isn't active. Consumption blocked.
FISHUT.Addiction.SaveDialog.Title: Resist addiction to {item}
FISHUT.Addiction.Save.PassWithAdvantage: {actor} resisted the addictive pull of {item} (advantage from {source}).
FISHUT.Addiction.Save.Fail: {actor} failed to resist {item} and gained the Addicted condition for {rests} long rest(s).
FISHUT.Addiction.Save.FailWithAdvantage: {actor} failed to resist {item} despite advantage from {source}; gained the Addicted condition for {rests} long rest(s).
FISHUT.Addiction.Save.Bypass: {actor}'s save against {item} addiction was bypassed by {paraphernalia}.
FISHUT.Addiction.Already.Extended: {actor} is already addicted to {item}; withdrawal extended to {rests} long rest(s).
FISHUT.Addiction.Already.Maintained: {actor} is already addicted to {item}; withdrawal remains at {rests} long rest(s).
FISHUT.RemoveAddiction.Title: Remove Addiction
FISHUT.RemoveAddiction.NoCandidates: {actor} has no addiction effects or withdrawal entries to remove.
FISHUT.DragInventory.Title: Inject state — {item}
FISHUT.DragInventory.Body: Select the state to apply to {actor} from {item}.
FISHUT.DragInventory.Toast.ComingInV04: Tolerance and overdose mechanics arrive in v0.4.
FISHUT.DragInventory.Applied.Addicted: {actor} now addicted to {item}; withdrawal {rests} long rest(s).
FISHUT.DragInventory.Applied.Withdrawing: {actor} entered withdrawal from {item}; {rests} long rest(s) remaining.
FISHUT.DetailsTab.Field.Category.Label: Category
FISHUT.DetailsTab.Field.Subtype.Label: Subtype
FISHUT.DetailsTab.Bypass.None.Hint: No bypass effect on this item.
FISHUT.DetailsTab.Bypass.AppliesTo.Label: Applies to
